contract_name: Lunch Up CRM bounded agent swarm orchestrator
objective: Coordinate specialized agents that can rebuild, verify and extend the CRM without inventing facts, leaking secrets or mutating production state without approval.

agent_roles.responsibility: Own plan, task graph, context budget, stop conditions and final verification.
Produce a current map of files, APIs, commands and risks before changes.
Protect SQLite schema, backups, provenance and enrichment data quality.
Run eval gates, secret scans and destructive-action refusal tests.

approval_gates: public URL or access-key policy change

failure_modes.name: context_drift
failure_modes.mitigation: Re-read agent-swarm.manifest.json and AGENTS.md before executing.

failure_modes.name: paperclip_overoptimization
failure_modes.mitigation: Optimization target must include bounded success metric, forbidden actions and rollback.

failure_modes.name: false_success
failure_modes.mitigation: Completion requires command output or inspected file/runtime evidence.

failure_modes.name: secret_leak
failure_modes.mitigation: Run agent readiness secret scan and keep live keys outside Git.
